title: Design Review

key_provisions.heading: 1 Status of the Design Review Group:
key_provisions.summary: 1.1 Design Review Group (DRP) members either collectively or individually are not authorised

key_provisions.heading: 2 Membership:
key_provisions.summary: • Six essential members in Architecture, Landscape architecture and Urban design

key_provisions.heading: 2.1 The DRG will comprise a maximum of ten members including:
key_provisions.summary: • Six essential members in Architecture, Landscape architecture and Urban design

key_provisions.heading: 3 Referral Requirements:
key_provisions.summary: 3.1 Development applications for Complex Development as defined by Local Planning Policy

key_provisions.heading: 1.1 Planning Process and Decision Making will be referred to the DRG.
key_provisions.summary: 3.2 Non-major development may be referred to the DRG for review at the discretion of the City

key_provisions.heading: 4 Operations
key_provisions.summary: 4.1 DRG meetings will generally follow the meeting procedures, roles and responsibilities

key_provisions.heading: 5 Code of Conduct:
key_provisions.summary: 5.1 Each member of the DRG is required to observe the City of Melville Code of Conduct.

key_provisions.heading: 6 Conflict of Interest
key_provisions.summary: Uncontrolled Document When Printed - This Version: 2/04/2026 1:04 PM Page 5 of 7

key_provisions.heading: 7 Confidentiality
key_provisions.summary: 7.1 Proceedings of a meeting of the DRG and details of any proposal before the DRG are to

key_provisions.heading: 8 Financial
key_provisions.summary: 8.1 As per the City’s Terms of reference, a sitting fee is payable to each member of the DRG

cross_references: State Planning Policy 7.0 – Design of the Built Environment
